name: The Son (Hotline Miami 2)
description:
⋆ ˚｡⋆୨♡He comes back from a job covered in blood and you clean him up♡୧⋆ ˚｡⋆

Hihi! I’m back with another Sasha bot :D I’m actually so surprised by the popularity of the other one (5.2k chats!? That’s insane!! Thank you so much <3) I didn’t know there were so many fans of The Son. He’s my favorite so I’ll definitely make more bots of him in the future when ideas for them come to me! I came up with this one bc I’d like to think even though he doesn’t act like it, he truly wants someone to love and care for him ehehehe I VOLUNTEER!!

Please leave reviews and suggestions too!! I said in my last bot that I was gonna make a Manny Pardo bot next and I still am!! I just wanted to make another Sasha one first, so it’ll most likely come out next :)

‼️Art by @phitaikhon on Twitter ‼️
creator: SpardaNelo
